element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Defensive mobility and aerial attack setup
Environmental collision mechanic for combo extension
Resource collection gate for special move activation

element_introduction_order.element: Special move activation (B button + energy ball)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: High-damage output dependent on resource availability
Advanced rope mechanic requiring spatial awareness

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating intensity: endless procedural rounds with speed scaling; round time compression (30:00 → 10:00 by round 100) creates mounting pressure; difficulty resets at round 255/0 overflow point

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate: basic move pool available; trainer-controlled energy ball frequency allows learning windows; opponent speed normal
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating: opponent AI aggression increases; special move availability becomes critical resource; round time compression begins (rounds 1-100)
difficulty_curve.late_game: Extreme: round time pressure peaks at 10:00 limit; opponent special move frequency high; procedural nature creates indefinite scaling until round 255
notable_spikes: Every 100 rounds: speed increase and difficulty jump
Round 100 transition: time reduces from 30:00 to 10:00
Round 255→0 overflow: speed resets but difficulty context suggests continued scaling expected

notable_level_patterns.description: Game operates on endless procedural rounds rather than discrete levels. Each round is a combat encounter with increasing opponent stats. Difficulty driven by round number, not spatial progression.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Rounds 1-100: standard pacing; Rounds 100+: compressed time window (10:00); Round 255: overflow point

notable_level_patterns.description: Special move availability controlled by random energy ball spawns from trainer, creating intermittent power windows. Forces adaptive rhythm of aggression during resource availability and defensive play during scarcity.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any round where energy ball is present vs. absent

notable_level_patterns.description: Ropes and ring boundaries create spatial gameplay zones. Shove mechanic redirects opponent into ropes for combo extension and positional advantage. Flying body attack requires rope positioning.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All rounds utilize rope interaction as core loop
